fields.label: body
fields.description: The body of the HTTP request/response to the web service which contains the payload.

fields.label: method
fields.description: The HTTP method of the request or response. Must be a valid method accepted by the service that handles the request.

fields.label: status code
fields.description: A list of valid, numeric, HTTP status codes that signifies the success of a request.

fields.label: url
fields.description: The HTTP path of the request after 'restconf/'.

modules.label: sonic_bgp
modules.tooltip: Manage global BGP and its parameters

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the BGP process that is configured on the device. In case of merged, the input configuration is merged with the existing BGP configuration on the device. In case of deleted, the existing BGP configuration is removed from the device. In case of replaced, the existing configuration of the specified BGP AS will be replaced with provided configuration. In case of overridden, the existing BGP configuration will be overridden with the provided configuration.

fields.label: as notation
fields.description: Specify the AS number notation format Option supported on Enterprise-Sonic releases 4.4.0 and higher.

fields.label: bgp as
fields.description: Specifies the BGP autonomous system (AS) number to configure on the device.

fields.label: log neighbor changes
fields.description: Enables/disables logging neighbor up/down and reset reason.

fields.label: router id
fields.description: Configures the BGP routing process router-id value.

fields.label: rt delay
fields.description: Time in seconds to wait before processing route-map changes. Range is 0-600. 0 disables the timer and changes to route-map will not be updated.

fields.label: vrf name
fields.description: Specifies the VRF name.

modules.label: sonic_bgp_af
modules.tooltip: Manage global BGP address-family and its parameters

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the BGP_AF process configured on the device. In case of merged, the input configuration is merged with the existing BGP_AF configuration on the device. In case of deleted, the existing BGP_AF configuration is removed from the device. In case of replaced, the existing BGP_AF of specified BGP AS will be replaced with provided configuration. In case of overridden, the existing BGP_AF configuration will be overridden with the provided configuration.

fields.label: bgp as
fields.description: Specifies the BGP autonomous system (AS) number which is already configured on the device.

fields.label: vrf name
fields.description: Specifies the VRF name which is already configured on the device.

modules.label: sonic_bgp_as_paths
modules.tooltip: Manage BGP autonomous system path (or as-path-list) and its parameters

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

fields.label: members
fields.description: Members of this BGP as-path; regular expression string can be provided.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of as-path-list.

fields.label: permit
fields.description: Permits or denies this as-path. Default value while adding a new as-path-list is C(False).

modules.label: sonic_bgp_communities
modules.tooltip: Manage BGP community and its parameters

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

fields.label: local as
fields.description: Do not send outside local AS (well-known community); applicable for standard BGP community type.

fields.label: match
fields.description: Matches any/all of the members. If unspecified, operational default value is C(ANY).

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the BGP community-list.

fields.label: no advertise
fields.description: Do not advertise to any peer (well-known community); applicable for standard BGP community type.

fields.label: no export
fields.description: Do not export to next AS (well-known community); applicable for standard BGP community type.

fields.label: no peer
fields.description: Do not export to next AS (well-known community); applicable for standard BGP community type.

fields.label: permit
fields.description: Permits or denies this community. If unspecified, operational default value is C(False).

fields.label: type
fields.description: Whether it is a standard or expanded community-list entry. If unspecified, operational default value is C(standard).

modules.label: sonic_bgp_ext_communities
modules.tooltip: Manage BGP extended community-list and its parameters

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

fields.label: match
fields.description: Matches any/all of the the members.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the BGP ext communitylist.

fields.label: permit
fields.description: Permits or denies this community. Default value while adding a new ext-community-list is False.

fields.label: type
fields.description: Whether it is a standard or expanded ext community_list entry.

modules.label: sonic_bgp_neighbors
modules.tooltip: Manage a BGP neighbor and its parameters

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the BGP process that is configured on the device. In case of merged, the input configuration is merged with the existing BGP configuration on the device. In case of deleted, the existing BGP configuration is removed from the device. In case of replaced, the existing BGP configuration will be replaced with the input BGP configuration on the device. In case of overridden, the existing BGP configuration will be overriden with the input BGP configuration on the device.

fields.label: bgp as
fields.description: Specifies the BGP autonomous system (AS) number which is already configured on the device.

fields.label: vrf name
fields.description: Specifies the VRF name which is already configured on the device.

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the BGP process that is configured on the device. In case of merged, the input configuration is merged with the existing BGP configuration on the device. In case of deleted, the existing BGP configuration is removed from the device.

fields.label: bgp as
fields.description: Specifies the BGP autonomous system (AS) number which is already configured on the device.

fields.label: vrf name

modules.label: sonic_br_l2pt

fields.label: name
fields.description: Interface name for L2PT configuration.

modules.label: sonic_command
modules.tooltip: Runs commands on devices running Enterprise SONiC

fields.label: commands
fields.description: List of commands to send to the remote Enterprise SONiC devices over the configured provider. The resulting output from the command is returned. If the I(wait_for) argument is provided, the module is not returned until the condition is satisfied or the number of retries has expired. If a command sent to the device requires answering a prompt, it is possible to pass a dict containing I(command), I(answer) and I(prompt). Common answers are 'yes' or "\r" (carriage return, must be double quotes). See examples.

fields.label: interval
fields.description: Configures the interval in seconds to wait between retries of the command. If the command does not pass the specified conditions, the interval indicates how long to wait before trying the command again.

fields.label: match
fields.description: The I(match) argument is used in conjunction with the I(wait_for) argument to specify the match policy.  Valid values are C(all) or C(any). If the value is set to C(all) then all conditionals in the wait_for must be satisfied. If the value is set to C(any) then only one of the values must be satisfied.

fields.label: retries
fields.description: Specifies the number of retries a command should be run before it is considered failed. The command is run on the target device every retry and evaluated against the I(wait_for) conditions.

fields.label: wait for
fields.description: List of conditions to evaluate against the output of the command. The task waits for each condition to be true before moving forward. If the conditional is not true within the configured number of retries, the task fails. See examples.

modules.label: sonic_config
modules.tooltip: Manages configuration sections on devices running Enterprise SONiC

fields.label: after
fields.description: The ordered set of commands to append to the end of the command stack if a change needs to be made. Just like with I(before), this allows the playbook designer to append a set of commands to be executed after the command set.

fields.label: backup
fields.description: This argument causes the module to create a full backup of the current C(running-configuration) from the remote device before any changes are made. If the C(backup_options) value is not given, the backup file is written to the C(backup) folder in the playbook root directory. If the directory does not exist, it is created.

fields.label: before
fields.description: The ordered set of commands to push on to the command stack if a change needs to be made. This allows the playbook designer the opportunity to perform configuration commands prior to pushing any changes without affecting how the set of commands are matched against the system.

fields.label: config
fields.description: The module, by default, connects to the remote device and retrieves the current running-configuration to use as a base for comparing against the contents of source. There are times when it is not desirable to have the task get the current running-configuration for every task in a playbook. The I(config) argument allows the implementer to pass in the configuration to use as the base configuration for comparison.

fields.label: lines
fields.description: The ordered set of commands that should be configured in the section. The commands must be the exact same commands as found in the device running-configuration. Be sure to note the configuration command syntax as some commands are automatically modified by the device configuration parser. This argument is mutually exclusive with I(src).

fields.label: match
fields.description: Instructs the module on the way to perform the matching of the set of commands against the current device configuration. If match is set to I(line), commands are matched line by line. If match is set to I(strict), command lines are matched with respect to position. If match is set to I(exact), command lines must be an equal match. If match is set to I(none), the module does not attempt to compare the source configuration with the running-configuration on the remote device.

fields.label: parents
fields.description: The ordered set of parents that uniquely identify the section or hierarchy the commands should be checked against. If the parents argument is omitted, the commands are checked against the set of top level or global commands.

fields.label: replace
fields.description: Instructs the module how to perform a configuration on the device. If the replace argument is set to I(line), then the modified lines are pushed to the device in configuration mode. If the replace argument is set to I(block), then the entire command block is pushed to the device in configuration mode if any line is not correct.

fields.label: save
fields.description: The C(save) argument instructs the module to save the running- configuration to the startup-configuration at the conclusion of the module running. If check mode is specified, this argument is ignored.

fields.label: src
fields.description: Specifies the source path to the file that contains the configuration or configuration template to load. The path to the source file can either be the full path on the Ansible control host, or a relative path from the playbook or role root directory. This argument is mutually exclusive with I(lines).

fields.label: update
fields.description: The I(update) argument controls how the configuration statements are processed on the remote device. Valid choices for the I(update) argument are I(merge) and I(check). When you set this argument to I(merge), the configuration changes merge with the current device running-configuration. When you set this argument to I(check), the configuration updates are determined but not configured on the remote device.

fields.label: state

C(deleted) - Deletes on-device DHCP and DHCPv6 relay configuration. C(replaced) - Replaces on-device DHCP and DHCPv6 relay configuration of the specified interfaces with provided configuration. C(overridden) - Overrides all on-device DHCP and DHCPv6 relay configurations with the provided configuration.

fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion

fields.label: df election time
fields.description: Election timer value in seconds Has a range of 0 to 86400 Default is 3

fields.label: es activation delay
fields.description: Activation delay in seconds Has a range of 0 to 1200000 Default is 0

fields.label: mac holdtime
fields.description: MAC hold time in seconds Has a range of 0 to 86400 Default is 1080 Specify 0 to disable MAC hold time

fields.label: neigh holdtime
fields.description: Neighbor hold time in seconds Has a range of 0 to 86400 Default is 1080 Specify 0 to disable neighbor hold time

fields.label: startup delay

modules.label: sonic_facts
modules.tooltip: Collects facts on devices running Enterprise SONiC

fields.label: gather network resources
fields.description: When supplied, this argument restricts the facts collected to a given subset. Possible values for this argument include all and the resources like 'all', 'interfaces', 'vlans', 'lag_interfaces', 'l2_interfaces', 'l3_interfaces'. Can specify a list of values to include a larger subset. Values can also be used with an initial '!' to specify that a specific subset should not be collected.

fields.label: gather subset
fields.description: When supplied, this argument restricts the facts collected to a given subset. Possible values for this argument include all, min, hardware, config, legacy, and interfaces. Can specify a list of values to include a larger subset. Values can also be used with an initial '!' to specify that a specific subset should not be collected.

modules.label: sonic_interfaces
modules.tooltip: Configure Interface attributes on interfaces such as, Eth, LAG, VLAN, and loopback. (create a loopback interface if it does not exist.)

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state the configuration should be left in.

fields.label: advertised speed
fields.description: Advertised speeds of the interface. Applicable only for Ethernet interfaces. Supported speeds are dependent on the type of switch. Speeds may be 10, 100, 1000, 2500, 5000, 10000, 20000, 25000, 40000, 50000, 100000, 400000 or 800000.

fields.label: auto negotiate
fields.description: auto-negotiate transmission parameters with peer interface. Applicable only for Ethernet interfaces.

fields.label: autoneg mode
fields.description: BAM/MSA configuration for autonegotiation Applicable only for Ethernet interfaces. auto_negotiate should be set to true to configure autoneg_mode with auto_negotiate set to true , autoneg_mode defaults to BAM

fields.label: description
fields.description: Description about the interface.

fields.label: enabled
fields.description: Administrative state of the interface.

fields.label: fec
fields.description: Interface FEC (Forward Error Correction). Applicable only for Ethernet interfaces.

fields.label: mtu
fields.description: MTU of the interface. Not applicable for Loopback interfaces.

fields.label: name
fields.description: The name of the interface, for example, 'Eth1/15'.

fields.label: speed
fields.description: Interface speed. Applicable only for Ethernet interfaces. Supported speeds are dependent on the type of switch.

fields.label: unreliable los
fields.description: Monitoring type to be used for generating a loss of service alarm.

fields.label: ipv6 drop neighbor aging time

fields.label: ipv6 nd cache expiry
fields.description: IPv6 ND cache expiry. The range is from 60 to 14400.

fields.label: num local neigh

C(replaced) - Replaces on-device IP neighbor configuration of the specified interfaces with provided configuration. C(overridden) - Overrides all on-device interface-specific IP neighbor configurations with the provided configuration. C(deleted) - Deletes on-device interface-specific IP neighbor configuration.

modules.label: sonic_ipv6_router_advertisement

fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion. C(merged) - Merges provided interface-specific IPv6 router advertisement configuration with on-device configuration. C(replaced) - Replaces on-device IPv6 router advertisement configuration of the specified interfaces with provided configuration. C(overridden) - Overrides all on-device interface-specific IPv6 router advertisement configurations with the provided configuration. C(deleted) - Deletes on-device interface-specific IPv6 router advertisement configuration.

fields.label: adv interval option
fields.description: Include Advertisement Interval option in Router Advertisement.

fields.label: home agent config
fields.description: Set 'Home Agent' flag in Router Advertisement.

fields.label: home agent lifetime
fields.description: Specifies the Home Agent lifetime in seconds when I(home_agent_config=True). The range is from 0 to 65520.

fields.label: home agent preference
fields.description: Specifies the Home Agent preference when I(home_agent_config=True). The range is from 0 to 65535.

fields.label: managed config
fields.description: Set 'Managed Address Configuration' flag in Router Advertisement.

fields.label: min ra interval
fields.description: Specifies the minimum Router Advertisement interval in seconds. The range is from 1 to 1350.

fields.label: min ra interval msec
fields.description: Specifies the minimum Router Advertisement interval in milliseconds. The range is from 30 to 1350000.

fields.label: mtu
fields.description: Specifies the MTU (in bytes) to be advertised. The range is from 0 to 65535.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Full name of the interface.

fields.label: other config
fields.description: Set 'Other Configuration' flag in Router Advertisement.

fields.label: ra fast retrans
fields.description: Enable faster transmissions of RA packets.

fields.label: ra hop limit
fields.description: Specifies the Hop limit to be advertised. The range is from 0 to 255.

fields.label: ra interval
fields.description: Specifies the maximum Router Advertisement interval in seconds. The range is from 1 to 1800.

fields.label: ra interval msec
fields.description: Specifies the maximum Router Advertisement interval in milliseconds. The range is from 70 to 1800000.

fields.label: ra lifetime
fields.description: Specifies the Router Lifetime in seconds. The range is from 0 to 9000.

fields.label: ra retrans interval
fields.description: Specifies the Retransmission Interval in milliseconds. The range is from 0 to 4294967295.

fields.label: reachable time
fields.description: Specifies the Reachable Time in milliseconds. The range is from 0 to 3600000.

fields.label: router preference
fields.description: Specifies the default router preference.

fields.label: suppress
fields.description: Enable suppression of Router Advertisement.

modules.label: sonic_ldap
modules.tooltip: Configure global LDAP server settings on SONiC.

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the LDAP server configured on the device. In case of merged, the input configuration will be merged with the existing LDAP server configuration on the device. In case of deleted, the existing LDAP server configuration will be removed from the device. In case of overridden, all the existing LDAP server configuration will be deleted and the specified input configuration will be installed. In case of replaced, the existing LDAP server configuration on the device will be replaced by the configuration in the playbook for each LDAP server group configured by the playbook.

fields.label: base
fields.description: Configure base distinguished name.

fields.label: bind timelimit
fields.description: Configure connect time limit (0 to 65535).

fields.label: binddn
fields.description: Configure distinguished name to bind.

fields.label: idle timelimit
fields.description: Configure NSS idle time limit (0 to 65535). Applicable only for global and nss.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Specifies the LDAP type.

fields.label: nss base group
fields.description: Configure NSS search base for group map. Applicable only for global and nss.

fields.label: nss base netgroup
fields.description: Configure NSS search base for netgroup map. Applicable only for global and nss.

fields.label: nss base passwd
fields.description: Configure NSS search base for passwd map. Applicable only for global, nss and pam.

fields.label: nss base shadow
fields.description: Configure NSS search base for shadow map. Applicable only for global and nss.

fields.label: nss base sudoers
fields.description: Configure NSS search base for sudoers map. Applicable only for global and nss.

fields.label: nss initgroups ignoreusers
fields.description: Configure NSS init groups ignore users. Applicable only for global and nss.

fields.label: nss skipmembers
fields.description: Configure NSS skipmembers

fields.label: pam filter
fields.description: Configure PAM filter. Applicable only for global and pam.

fields.label: pam group dn
fields.description: Configure PAM Group Distinguished name. Applicable only for global and pam.

fields.label: pam login attribute
fields.description: Configure PAM Login attribute. Applicable only for global and pam.

fields.label: pam member attribute
fields.description: Configure PAM Member attribute. Applicable only for global and pam.

fields.label: retry
fields.description: Configure retransmit attempt (0 to 10).

fields.label: scope
fields.description: Configure the search scope. Applicable only for global, nss and pam.

fields.label: security profile
fields.description: Configure security profile for LDAP. Applicable only for global.

fields.label: source interface
fields.description: Configure source interface to be used as source IP for the LDAP packets. Applicable only for global. Full name of the Layer 3 interface, i.e. Eth1/1.

fields.label: ssl
fields.description: Configure TLS configuration.

fields.label: sudoers base
fields.description: Configure sudo base distinguished name for queries. Applicable only for global and sudo.

fields.label: sudoers search filter
fields.description: Configure sudo search filter for queries. Applicable only for global and sudo.

fields.label: timelimit
fields.description: Configure search time limit (1 to 65535).

fields.label: version
fields.description: Configure LDAP version 2 or 3.

fields.label: vrf
fields.description: Configure VRF to be used for LDAP server connection. Applicable only for global.

modules.label: sonic_lldp_global
modules.tooltip: Manage Global LLDP configurations on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state specifies the type of configuration update to be performed on the device. If the state is "merged", merge specified attributes with existing configured attributes. For "deleted", delete the specified attributes from existing configuration.

fields.label: enable
fields.description: This argument is a boolean value to enable or disable LLDP.

fields.label: hello time
fields.description: Frequency at which LLDP advertisements are sent (in seconds). The range is from 5 to 254 sec

fields.label: mode
fields.description: By default both transmit and receive of LLDP frames is enabled. This command can be used to configure either in receive only or transmit only mode.

fields.label: multiplier
fields.description: Multiplier value is used to determine the timeout interval (i.e. hello-time x multiplier value) The range is from 1 to 10

fields.label: system description
fields.description: Description of this system to be sent in LLDP advertisements. When configured, this value is used in the advertisements instead of the default system description.

fields.label: system name
fields.description: Specifying a descriptive system name using this command, user may find it easier to distinguish the device with LLDP. By default, the host name is used.

modules.label: sonic_lldp_interfaces
modules.tooltip: Manage Inteface LLDP configurations on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state specifies the type of configuration update to be performed on the device. If the state is "merged", merge specified attributes with existing configured attributes. For "deleted", delete the specified attributes from existing configuration. For "replaced", replaces lldp interface configuration of the specified interfaces with provided configuration. For "overridden", overrides all on-device lldp interface configurations with the provided configuration.

fields.label: enable
fields.description: This argument is a boolean value to enable or disable LLDP. This command is supported only on physical interfaces and not on logical interfaces.

fields.label: mode
fields.description: By default both transmit and receive of LLDP frames is enabled. This command can be used to configure either in receive only or transmit only mode. This command is supported on physical and logical interfaces.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Interface name in which LLDP needs to be configured on.

fields.label: network policy
fields.description: Network policy number, range 1-128.

modules.label: sonic_logging
modules.tooltip: Manage logging configuration on SONiC.

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

fields.label: security profile
fields.description: Specifies the security profile name for the global syslog settings.

modules.label: sonic_login_lockout
modules.tooltip: Manage Global Login Lockout configurations on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the login attributes configured on the device. If the state is "merged", merge specified attributes with existing configured login attributes. For "deleted", delete the specified login attributes from existing configuration. For "overridden", Overrides all on-device login lockout configurations with the provided configuration. For "replaced", Replaces on-device login lockout configurations with the provided configuration.

fields.label: console exempt
fields.description: Exempt console logins from account lockout.

fields.label: max retries
fields.description: The number of maximum password retries. The range is from 0 to 16

fields.label: period
fields.description: Account lockout period in minutes The range is from 0 to 43200

modules.label: sonic_lst
modules.tooltip: Manage link state tracking (LST) configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion

modules.label: sonic_mac
modules.tooltip: Manage MAC configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion

fields.label: vrf name
fields.description: Specifies the VRF name.

modules.label: sonic_mclag
modules.tooltip: Manage multi chassis link aggregation groups domain (MCLAG) and its parameters

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state that the configuration should be left in.

fields.label: backup keepalive interval
fields.description: MCLAG backup keepalive session interval in secs. Supported interval range is 1-60.

fields.label: backup keepalive peer address
fields.description: The IPV4 backup-keepalive-peer-ip to establish MCLAG backup keepalive session

fields.label: backup keepalive session vrf
fields.description: MCLAG backup keepalive session VRF

fields.label: backup keepalive source address
fields.description: The IPV4 backup-keepalive-source-ip to establish MCLAG backup keepalive session

fields.label: delay restore
fields.description: MCLAG delay restore time in secs.

fields.label: domain id
fields.description: ID of the mclag domain (MCLAG domain).

fields.label: gateway mac
fields.description: Gateway MAC address for router ports over MCLAG. Configured gateway MAC address can be modified only when I(state=replaced) or I(state=overridden).

fields.label: keepalive
fields.description: MCLAG session keepalive-interval in secs.

fields.label: peer address
fields.description: The IPV4 peer-ip for corresponding MCLAG.

fields.label: peer link
fields.description: Peer-link for corresponding MCLAG.

fields.label: session timeout
fields.description: MCLAG session timeout value in secs.

fields.label: session vrf
fields.description: MCLAG session VRF. Session VRF value can be either mgmt or a non-default VRF.

fields.label: source address
fields.description: The IPV4 source-ip for corresponding MCLAG.

fields.label: system mac
fields.description: MAC address of MCLAG.

modules.label: sonic_mfa
modules.tooltip: Manage Multi-factor authentication (MFA) configurations on SONiC.

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion. C(merged) - Merges provided MFA configuration with on-device configuration. C(replaced) - Replaces on-device MFA configuration with provided configuration. C(overridden) - Overrides all on-device MFA configurations with the provided configuration. C(deleted) - Deletes on-device MFA configuration.

modules.label: sonic_mgmt_servers
modules.tooltip: Manage management servers configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

modules.label: sonic_mirroring
modules.tooltip: Manage port mirroring configuration on SONiC.

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the mirroring configured on the device. In case of merged, the input configuration will be merged with the existing configuration on the device. In case of deleted, the input configuration will be removed from the device. In case of overridden, all existing mirroring configuration will be deleted and the specified input configuration will be added. In case of replaced, the existing mirroring configuration on the device will be replaced by the new specified configuration for each affected mirroring session.

modules.label: sonic_network_policy
modules.tooltip: Manage network policy configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion

fields.label: number
fields.description: Network policy number, range 1-128

modules.label: sonic_ntp
modules.tooltip: Manage NTP configuration on SONiC.

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

fields.label: enable ntp auth
fields.description: Enable or disable NTP authentication.

fields.label: source interfaces
fields.description: List of names of NTP source interfaces.

fields.label: trusted keys
fields.description: List of trusted NTP authentication keys.

fields.label: vrf
fields.description: VRF name on which NTP is enabled.

modules.label: sonic_ospf_area
modules.tooltip: configure OSPF area settings on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the type of configuration update to be performed on the device.

fields.label: area id
fields.description: Area ID of the network (A.B.C.D or 0 to 4294967295).

fields.label: authentication type
fields.description: authentication type for area

fields.label: default cost
fields.description: Configure NSSA or stub area summary default cost range is 0 to 16777215 inclusive

fields.label: filter list in
fields.description: inter area prefix filter list. Filter incoming prefixes into the area. expects name of a prefix list.

fields.label: filter list out
fields.description: inter area prefix filter list. Filter outgoing prefixes from the area. expects name of a prefix list.

fields.label: networks
fields.description: Configure networks in an area is a masked ip address

fields.label: shortcut
fields.description: Configure area's shortcut mode

fields.label: vrf name
fields.description: name of the vrf this area belongs to

modules.label: sonic_ospfv2
modules.tooltip: Configure global OSPFv2 protocol settings on SONiC.

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the OSPFv2 process configured on the device. In case of merged, the input configuration will be merged with the existing OSPFv2 configuration on the device. In case of deleted, the existing OSPFv2 configuration will be removed from the device. In case of overridden, all the existing OSPFv2 configuration will be deleted and the specified input configuration will be installed. In case of replaced, the existing OSPFv2 configuration on the device will be replaced by the configuration in the playbook for each VRF group configured by the playbook.

fields.label: abr type
fields.description: Configure router ABR type. C(cisco) - Cisco implementation type ABR. C(ibm) - IBM implementation type ABR. C(shortcut) - Shortcut ABR. C(standard) - RFC2328 Standard implementation ABR.

fields.label: auto cost reference bandwidth
fields.description: Configure interface auto cost reference bandwidth (1 to 4294967).

fields.label: default metric
fields.description: Configure metric for redistributed routes (0 to 16777214).

fields.label: default passive
fields.description: Suppresses OSPFv2 routing updates on all interfaces.

fields.label: log adjacency changes
fields.description: Enable OSPFv2 adjacency state logs.

fields.label: maximum paths
fields.description: Configure maximum number of multiple paths for ECMP support (1 to 256).

fields.label: opaque lsa capability
fields.description: Enables opaque LSA capability.

fields.label: refresh timer
fields.description: Configures LSA refresh interval in seconds (10 to 1800).

fields.label: rfc1583 compatible
fields.description: Enable OSPFv2 RFC compatibility.

fields.label: router id
fields.description: Configure OSPFv2 router identifier (A.B.C.D).

fields.label: vrf name
fields.description: Specifies the vrf name.

fields.label: write multiplier
fields.description: Specifies the maximum number of interfaces serviced per write (1 to 100)

modules.label: sonic_ospfv2_interfaces
modules.tooltip: Configure OSPFv2 interface mode protocol settings on SONiC.

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the OSPFv2 interfaces configured on the device. In case of merged, the input configuration will be merged with the existing OSPFv2 interfaces configuration on the device. In case of deleted, the existing OSPFv2 interfaces configuration will be removed from the device. In case of overridden, all the existing OSPFv2 interfaces configuration will be deleted and the specified input configuration will be installed. In case of replaced, the existing OSPFv2 interface configuration on the device will be replaced by the configuration in the playbook for each interface group configured by the playbook.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Full name of the interface, i.e. Ethernet1.

fields.label: network
fields.description: Configure OSPFv2 interface network type

modules.label: sonic_ospfv3
modules.tooltip: Configure global OSPFv3 protocol settings on SONiC.

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the OSPFv3 process configured on the device. In case of merged, the input configuration will be merged with the existing OSPFv3 configuration on the device. In case of deleted, the specified existing OSPFv3 configuration will be removed from the device. In case of overridden, all the existing OSPFv3 configuration will be deleted and the specified input configuration will be installed. In case of replaced, the existing OSPFv3 configuration on the device will be replaced by the configuration in the playbook for each VRF group configured by the playbook.

fields.label: auto cost reference bandwidth
fields.description: Configure interface auto cost reference bandwidth (1 to 4294967).

fields.label: log adjacency changes
fields.description: Enable OSPFv3 adjacency state logs.

fields.label: maximum paths
fields.description: Configure maximum number of multiple paths for ECMP support (1 to 256).

fields.label: router id
fields.description: Configure OSPFv3 router identifier (A.B.C.D).

fields.label: vrf name
fields.description: Specifies the vrf name.

fields.label: write multiplier
fields.description: Configure write multiplier (1 to 100). Maximum number of interfaces serviced per write.

modules.label: sonic_ospfv3_area
modules.tooltip: Configure OSPFv3 area settings on SONiC.

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the type of configuration update to be performed on the device.

fields.label: area id
fields.description: Area ID of the network (A.B.C.D or 0 to 4294967295).

fields.label: filter list in
fields.description: Inter-area prefix filter list. Filter incoming prefixes into the area. Expects name of a prefix list.

fields.label: filter list out
fields.description: Inter-area prefix filter list. Filter outgoing prefixes from the area. Expects name of a prefix list.

fields.label: vrf name
fields.description: Name of the VRF this area belongs to.

modules.label: sonic_ospfv3_interfaces
modules.tooltip: Configure OSPFv3 interface mode protocol settings on SONiC.

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the OSPFv3 interfaces configured on the device. In case of merged, the input configuration will be merged with the existing OSPFv3 interfaces configuration on the device. In case of deleted, the specified existing OSPFv3 interfaces configuration will be removed from the device. In case of overridden, all the existing OSPFv3 interfaces configuration will be deleted and the specified input configuration will be installed. In case of replaced, the existing OSPFv3 interface configuration on the device will be replaced by the configuration in the playbook for each interface group configured by the playbook.

fields.label: advertise
fields.description: Enable OSPFv3 interface advertise. expects name of a prefix list.

fields.label: area id
fields.description: OSPFv3 Area ID of the network (A.B.C.D or 0 to 4294967295).

fields.label: cost
fields.description: Configure OSPFv3 interface cost (1 to 65535).

fields.label: dead interval
fields.description: Configure OSPFv3 adjacency dead interval (1 to 65535).

fields.label: hello interval
fields.description: Configure OSPFv3 neighbour hello interval (1 to 65535).

fields.label: mtu ignore
fields.description: Disable OSPFv3 MTU mismatch detection.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Full name of the interface, i.e. Ethernet1.

fields.label: network
fields.description: Configure OSPFv3 interface network type

fields.label: passive
fields.description: Configure ospfv3 interface as passive.

fields.label: priority
fields.description: Configure OSPFv3 adjacency router priority (0 to 255).

fields.label: retransmit interval
fields.description: Configure OSPFv3 retransmit interval (2 to 65535).

fields.label: transmit delay
fields.description: Configure OSPFv3 transmit delay (1 to 65535).

modules.label: sonic_pim_global
modules.tooltip: Manage global PIM configurations on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion. C(merged) - Merges provided global PIM configuration with on-device configuration. C(replaced) - Replaces on-device PIM configuration of the specified VRFs with provided configuration. C(overridden) - Overrides all on-device global PIM configurations with the provided configuration. C(deleted) - Deletes on-device global PIM configuration.

fields.label: ecmp enable
fields.description: Enable PIM ECMP.

fields.label: ecmp rebalance enable
fields.description: Enable PIM ECMP rebalance. ECMP has to be enabled for configuring ECMP rebalance.

fields.label: join prune interval
fields.description: Specifies the PIM Join Prune Interval in seconds. The range is from 60 to 600.

fields.label: keepalive timer
fields.description: Specifies the PIM Keepalive timer in seconds. The range is from 31 to 60000.

fields.label: ssm prefix list
fields.description: Specifies the SSM prefix-list.

fields.label: vrf name
fields.description: Name of the VRF to which the PIM configurations belong.

modules.label: sonic_pim_interfaces
modules.tooltip: Manage interface-specific PIM configurations on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion. C(merged) - Merges provided interface-specific PIM configuration with on-device configuration. C(replaced) - Replaces on-device PIM configuration of the specified interfaces with provided configuration. C(overridden) - Overrides all on-device interface-specific PIM configurations with the provided configuration. C(deleted) - Deletes on-device interface-specific PIM configuration.

fields.label: bfd enable
fields.description: Enable BFD support for PIM.

fields.label: bfd profile
fields.description: Specifies the BFD profile to be enabled. BFD support for PIM has to be enabled for configuring BFD profile.

fields.label: drpriority
fields.description: Specifies the Designated Router Priority. The range is from 1 to 4294967295.

fields.label: hello interval
fields.description: Specifies the Hello interval in seconds. The range is from 1 to 255.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Full name of the interface.

fields.label: sparse mode
fields.description: Enable PIM sparse-mode.

modules.label: sonic_pki
modules.tooltip: Manages PKI attributes of Enterprise Sonic

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

modules.label: sonic_pms
modules.tooltip: Configure interface mode port security settings on SONiC.

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the port security related interfaces configured on the device. In case of merged, the input configuration will be merged with the existing port security interfaces related configuration on the device. In case of deleted, the existing OSPFv2 interfaces configuration will be removed from the device. In case of overridden, all the existing OSPFv2 interfaces configuration will be deleted and the specified input configuration will be installed. In case of replaced, the existing interface configuration on the device will be replaced by the configuration in the playbook for each interface group configured by the playbook.

fields.label: max allowed macs
fields.description: Maximum no. of secure MACs allowed on the interface. (1 to 4097) If I(port_security_enable=True) and I(max_allowed_macs) not configured, default is C(1).

fields.label: name
fields.description: Full name of the interface, i.e. Ethernet1.

fields.label: port security enable
fields.description: Enables port security at interface level. If I(port_security_enable=False), entire port security configurations will be deleted.

fields.label: sticky mac
fields.description: Enable sticky MAC feature on the interface. If I(port_security_enable=True) and I(sticky_mac) not configured, default is C(False).

fields.label: violation
fields.description: Configure the action to be taken in the event of security violation. C(SHUTDOWN) - Shutdown the interface. C(PROTECT) - Drop packets received on the interface. If I(port_security_enable=True) and I(violation) not configured, default is C(PROTECT).

modules.label: sonic_poe
modules.tooltip: Manage PoE configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion

modules.label: sonic_port_breakout
modules.tooltip: Configure port breakout settings on physical interfaces

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the port breakout configured on the device. In case of merged, the input mode configuration will be merged with the existing port breakout configuration on the device. In case of deleted, the existing port breakout mode configuration will be removed from the device. In case of replaced, on-device port breakout configuration of the specified interfaces is replaced with provided configuration. In case of overridden, all on-device port breakout configurations are overridden with the provided configuration.

fields.label: mode
fields.description: Specifies the mode of the port breakout.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Specifies the name of the port breakout.

modules.label: sonic_port_group
modules.tooltip: Manages port group configuration on SONiC.

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

fields.label: id
fields.description: The index of the port group.

fields.label: speed
fields.description: Speed for the port group. This configures the speed for all the memebr ports of the prot group. Supported speeds are dependent on the type of switch.

modules.label: sonic_prefix_lists
modules.tooltip: prefix list configuration handling for SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the type of configuration update to be performed on the device. For "merged", merge specified attributes with existing configured attributes. For "deleted", delete the specified attributes from existing configuration. For "replaced", replace the specified existing configuration with the provided configuration. For "overridden", override the existing configuration with the provided configuration.

fields.label: afi
fields.description: Specifies the Address Family for addresses in the prefix list entries

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of a prefix set (a list of prefix entries)

modules.label: sonic_ptp_default_ds
modules.tooltip: Manage global PTP configurations on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion. C(merged) - Merges provided PTP configuration with on-device configuration. C(replaced) - Replaces on-device PTP configuration with provided configuration. C(overridden) - Overrides all on-device PTP configurations with the provided configuration. C(deleted) - Deletes on-device PTP configuration.

fields.label: announce receipt timeout
fields.description: The number of announceIntervals that have to pass without receipt of an Announce message before the occurrence of the event ANNOUNCE_RECEIPT_TIMEOUT_EXPIRES.

fields.label: clock type
fields.description: Specifies the type of clock configured in the PTP domain.

fields.label: domain number
fields.description: The domain number of the current syntonization domain. The range is from 0 to 127.

fields.label: domain profile
fields.description: The method to be used when comparing data sets during the Best Master Clock Algorithm.

fields.label: log announce interval
fields.description: The base-2 logarithm of the mean announceInterval (mean time interval between successive Announce messages).

fields.label: log min delay req interval
fields.description: The base-2 logarithm of the minDelayReqInterval. The minimum permitted mean time interval between successive Delay_Req messages.

fields.label: log sync interval
fields.description: The base-2 logarithm of the mean SyncInterval for multicast messages.

fields.label: network transport
fields.description: The network transport used for communication.

fields.label: priority1
fields.description: The priority1 attribute of the local clock. The range is from 0 to 255.

fields.label: priority2
fields.description: The priority2 attribute of the local clock. The range is from 0 to 255.

fields.label: source interface
fields.description: Source interface whose IP to use as source ip for PTP IPv4 and IPv6 multicast transport mode.

fields.label: two step flag
fields.description: The clockAccuracy indicates the expected accuracy of the clock.

fields.label: unicast multicast
fields.description: Specifies whether the network transport uses unicast or multicast communication.

modules.label: sonic_ptp_port_ds
modules.tooltip: Manage port specific PTP configurations on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion. C(merged) - Merges provided interface-specific PTP configuration with on-device configuration. C(replaced) - Replaces on-device PTP configuration of the specified interfaces with provided configuration. C(overridden) - Overrides all on-device interface-specific PTP configurations with the provided configuration. C(deleted) - Deletes on-device interface-specific PTP configuration.

fields.label: interface
fields.description: Specifies the name of the interface.

fields.label: local priority
fields.description: Specifies the local-priority attribute used for the profile G8275-1 and G8275-2. The range is from 1 to 255.

fields.label: role
fields.description: Specifies the role of interface.

fields.label: unicast table
fields.description: List of ip addresses to use for PTP master.

modules.label: sonic_qos_buffer
modules.tooltip: Manage QoS buffer configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion Replaced and overridden states are not supported for this module due to configuration constraints

fields.label: buffer init
fields.description: Initialize QoS buffer based on system defaults Buffer must be initialized to configure I(buffer_pools) and I(buffer_profiles)

modules.label: sonic_qos_interfaces
modules.tooltip: Manage QoS interfaces configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion Replaced and overridden states are not supported for this module due to configuration constraints

fields.label: cable length
fields.description: Cable length of the interface

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the interface

fields.label: scheduler policy
fields.description: Name of scheduler policy to be applied to traffic on the interface

modules.label: sonic_qos_maps
modules.tooltip: Manage QoS maps configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

modules.label: sonic_qos_pfc
modules.tooltip: Manage QoS PFC configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

fields.label: counter poll
fields.description: Enable or disable use of flex-counters for PFC watchdog

fields.label: poll interval
fields.description: Polling interval for PFC watchdog Range 100-3000

modules.label: sonic_qos_scheduler
modules.tooltip: Manage QoS scheduler configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of scheduler policy

modules.label: sonic_qos_wred
modules.tooltip: Manage QoS WRED profiles configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

fields.label: ecn
fields.description: ECN setting for colored packets

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the WRED profile

modules.label: sonic_radius_server
modules.tooltip: Manage RADIUS server configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the radius server configured on the device. In case of merged, the input mode configuration will be merged with the existing radius server configuration on the device. In case of deleted the existing radius server mode configuration will be removed from the device. In case of replaced, the existing radius server configuration will be replaced with provided configuration. In case of overridden, the existing radius server configuration will be overridden with the provided configuration.

fields.label: auth type
fields.description: Specifies the authentication type of the radius server. The default is C(pap).

fields.label: key
fields.description: Specifies the key of the radius server.

fields.label: nas ip
fields.description: Specifies the network access server of the radius server.

fields.label: retransmit
fields.description: Specifies the re-transmit value of the radius server. The range is 0 to 10.

fields.label: statistics
fields.description: Specifies the statistics flag of the radius server.

modules.label: sonic_roce
modules.tooltip: Manage RoCE QoS configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

fields.label: pfc priority
fields.description: Specifies the PFC priorities to enable RoCEv2 buffer default configuration on Range 0-7, two priority values separated by comma Ex. '3,4' Only configurable when RoCE is enabled

fields.label: roce enable
fields.description: Enable or disable RoCEv2 default buffer configuration

modules.label: sonic_route_maps
modules.tooltip: route map configuration handling for SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the type of configuration update to be performed on the device. For C(merged), merge specified attributes with existing configured attributes. For C(deleted), delete the specified attributes from existing configuration. For C(replaced), replace each modified list or dictionary with the specified items. For C(overridden), replace all current configuration for this resource module with the specified configuration.

fields.label: action
fields.description: action type for the route map (permit or deny) This value is required for creation and modification of a route map or route map attributes as well as for deletion of route map attributes. It can be omitted only when requesting deletion of a route map statement or all route map statements for a given route map map_name.

fields.label: call
fields.description: Name of a route map to jump to after executing 'match' and 'set' statements for the current route map.

fields.label: map name
fields.description: Name of a route map

fields.label: sequence num
fields.description: unique number in the range 1-66535 to specify priority of the map This value is required for creation and modification of a route map or route map attributes as well as for deletion of route map attributes. It can be omitted only when requesting deletion of all route map "statements" for a given route map "map_name".

modules.label: sonic_sflow
modules.tooltip: configure sflow settings on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the type of configuration update to be performed on the device.

fields.label: agent
fields.description: The Agent interface

fields.label: enabled
fields.description: Enables or disables sflow sampling for the device.

fields.label: max header size
fields.description: sflow maximum header size in bytes. must be in multiple of 128 bytes from 128 to 1024.

fields.label: polling interval
fields.description: sflow polling interval (in seconds). must be 0 or in range 5-300

fields.label: sampling rate
fields.description: Sets global packet sampling rate. Sample 1 packet for every sampling_rate number of packets flowing through the interface

modules.label: sonic_ssh
modules.tooltip: Manage SSH configurations on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state specifies the type of configuration update to be performed on the device. If the state is "merged", merge specified attributes with existing configured attributes. For "deleted", delete the specified attributes from existing configuration. For "replaced", replace on-device SSH configuration with the specified configuration. For "overridden", override on-device SSH configurations with the specified configuration.

modules.label: sonic_ssh_server
modules.tooltip: Manage SSH server configurations on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

modules.label: sonic_static_routes
modules.tooltip: Manage static routes configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

fields.label: vrf name
fields.description: Name of the configured VRF on the device.

modules.label: sonic_stp
modules.tooltip: Manage STP configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion

modules.label: sonic_system
modules.tooltip: Configure system parameters

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the system parameters configured on the device. In case of merged, the input configuration will be merged with the existing system configuration on the device. In case of deleted the existing system configuration will be removed from the device.

fields.label: adjust txrx clock freq
fields.description: Adjust TX/RX clock frequency to platform specific value. Operational default value is C(false).

fields.label: audit rules
fields.description: Specifies audit rule profile type. Can be used on SONiC release versions 4.4.0 and above.

fields.label: auto breakout
fields.description: Specifies auto-breakout status in the device

fields.label: concurrent session limit
fields.description: Specifies limit on number of concurrent sessions Range 1-12

fields.label: hostname
fields.description: Specifies the hostname of the SONiC device

fields.label: interface naming
fields.description: Specifies the type of interface-naming in device

fields.label: load share hash algo
fields.description: Specifies different types of ECMP Load share hash algorithm

fields.label: login exec timeout
fields.description: CLI session timeout value. The range is from 0 to 3600 Default is 600

fields.label: switching mode
fields.description: Specifies switching mode in the device. Operational default value is STORE_AND_FORWARD.

modules.label: sonic_tacacs_server
modules.tooltip: Manage TACACS server and its parameters

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the tacacs server configured on the device. In case of merged, the input mode configuration will be merged with the existing tacacs server configuration on the device. In case of deleted the existing tacacs server mode configuration will be removed from the device. In case of replaced, the existing tacacs server configuration will be replaced with provided configuration. In case of overridden, the existing tacacs server configuration will be overridden with the provided configuration.

fields.label: auth type
fields.description: Specifies the authentication type of the tacacs server.

fields.label: key
fields.description: Specifies the key of the tacacs server.

fields.label: source interface
fields.description: Specifies the source interface of the tacacs server.

modules.label: sonic_users
modules.tooltip: Manage users and its parameters

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the users configured on the device. In case of merged, the input configuration will be merged with the existing users configuration on the device. In case of deleted the existing users configuration will be removed from the device. In case of replaced, the existing specified user configuration will be replaced with provided configuration. In case of overridden, the existing users configuration will be overridden with the provided configuration.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Specifies the name of the user.

fields.label: role
fields.description: Specifies the role of the user.

fields.label: ssh key
fields.description: Specifies the user ssh key for an existing user. The ssh key pair (public and private key) can be created using ssh-keygen command on the server from where the user will connect to the SONiC device. Only the public key is configured in the ssh_key field. The ssh_key option can only be "merged" after initial creation of the affected "user" instance and must be merged without any additional options specified other than "name". It can only be deleted as an individual option if it is the only option specified. If other options are specified for deletion, the entire user instance is deleted.

fields.label: update password
fields.description: Specifies the update password flag. In case of always, password will be updated every time. In case of on_create, password will be updated only when user is created.

modules.label: sonic_vlan_mapping
modules.tooltip: Configure vlan mappings on SONiC.

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the vlan mappings configured on the device. In case of merged, the input configuration will be merged with the existing vlan mappings on the device. In case of deleted, the existing vlan mapping configuration will be removed from the device. In case of overridden, all existing vlan mappings will be deleted and the specified input configuration will be add. In case of replaced, the existing vlan mappings on the device will be replaced by the configuration for each vlan mapping.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Full name of the interface, i.e. Ethernet8, PortChannel2, Eth1/2.

modules.label: sonic_vlans
modules.tooltip: Manage VLAN and its parameters

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state that the configuration should be left in.

fields.label: autostate
fields.description: Enable or disable autostate functionality for the VLAN interface. Default value for this field if not configured yet will be "enable" which is equivalent to true.

fields.label: description
fields.description: Description about the VLAN.

fields.label: vlan id
fields.description: ID of the VLAN Range is 1 to 4094

modules.label: sonic_vrfs
modules.tooltip: Manage VRFs and associate VRFs to interfaces such as, Eth, LAG, VLAN, and loopback

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

fields.label: name
fields.description: The name of the VRF interface.

modules.label: sonic_vrrp
modules.tooltip: Configure VRRP protocol settings on SONiC.

fields.label: state
fields.description: Specifies the operation to be performed on the VRRP process configured on the device. In case of merged, the input configuration will be merged with the existing VRRP configuration on the device. In case of deleted, the existing VRRP configuration will be removed from the device. In case of overridden, all existing VRRP configuration will be deleted and the specified input configuration will be installed. In case of replaced, the existing VRRP configuration on the device will be replaced by the configuration in the playbook for each VRRP interface/group configured by the playbook.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Full name of the Layer 3 interface, i.e. Eth1/1.

modules.label: sonic_vxlans
modules.tooltip: Manage VXLAN configuration on SONiC

fields.label: state
fields.description: The state of the configuration after module completion

fields.label: dscp
fields.description: DSCP value of the VXLAN tunnel outer IP header, range 0-63 Valid only when I(qos_mode=pipe) Functional default is 0

fields.label: evpn nvo
fields.description: EVPN NVO name

fields.label: external ip
fields.description: The VTEP MCLAG external IP address for this node

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the VXLAN

fields.label: primary ip
fields.description: The VTEP MCLAG primary IP address for this node

fields.label: qos mode
fields.description: QoS mode to use for prioritizing the network traffic within a VXLAN tunnel Functional default is C(pipe)

fields.label: source ip
fields.description: Source IP address of the VTEP
